mapper.insert: INSERT INTO service_review (elder_id, child_id, score, comment, review_month, type, status, created_at) VALUES (#{elderId}, #{childId}, #{score}, #{comment}, #{reviewMonth}, #{type}, #{status}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE service_review SET elder_id = #{elderId}, child_id = #{childId}, score = #{score}, comment = #{comment}, review_month = #{reviewMonth}, type = #{type}, status = #{status}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, attitude = #{attitude}, response = #{response}, quality = #{quality}, satisfaction = #{satisfaction}, suggestion = #{suggestion}, created_at = #{createdAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, elder_id, child_id, score, comment, review_month, type, status, completed_at, attitude, response, quality, satisfaction, suggestion, created_at FROM service_review WHERE elder_id = #{elderId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, elder_id, child_id, score, comment, review_month, type, status, completed_at, attitude, response, quality, satisfaction, suggestion, created_at FROM service_review WHERE child_id = #{childId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, elder_id, child_id, score, comment, review_month, type, status, completed_at, attitude, response, quality, satisfaction, suggestion, created_at FROM service_review WHERE child_id = #{childId} AND review_month = #{reviewMonth} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, elder_id, child_id, score, comment, review_month, type, status, completed_at, attitude, response, quality, satisfaction, suggestion, created_at FROM service_review ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, elder_id, child_id, score, comment, review_month, type, status, completed_at, attitude, response, quality, satisfaction, suggestion, created_at FROM service_review WHERE review_month = #{reviewMonth} ORDER BY created_at DESC
